content.tagline: Keeping Your Vessel in Peak Condition
content.about:
Welcome to Ben's Boatworks, a full-service marine facility based in Annapolis, MD, dedicated to keeping your vessel in peak operating condition throughout every season. We work with boat owners across South Florida and the surrounding waters, bringing hands-on expertise and a genuine commitment to quality marine craftsmanship to every job we take on.

At Ben's Boatworks, we offer a comprehensive range of specialized marine services — including professional boat surveying and inspection, diving and underwater services, marine AC and climate control, and marine plumbing and sanitation. Whether you need a thorough pre-purchase survey before buying a vessel, underwater hull cleaning and inspection, a malfunctioning marine air conditioning system diagnosed and repaired, or a complete overhaul of your onboard plumbing and sanitation systems, we have the skills and equipment to handle it right.

We understand that your boat represents a significant investment, and we treat every vessel with that in mind. Our clients range from first-time boat owners to seasoned mariners throughout the South Florida region, and we take pride in delivering reliable, honest service every time. From the docks of Annapolis to the waters we serve across a 60-mile radius, Ben's Boatworks is the marine services partner you can count on to get the job done properly and keep you on the water.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, diving services, marine AC & plumbing across South Florida. Call us today!

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: Ben's Boatworks provides thorough boat surveying and inspection services, evaluating a vessel's structural integrity, mechanical systems, and overall condition. Whether you're preparing for a purchase, insurance requirement, or routine assessment, a professional marine survey helps you make informed decisions and avoid costly surprises down the line.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Our diving and underwater services cover hull inspections, propeller checks, zinc replacement, underwater cleaning, and retrieval work — all performed by experienced marine divers without the need to haul your vessel out of the water. Keeping your running gear and hull clean and damage-free directly impacts your boat's performance and fuel efficiency.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: Ben's Boatworks installs, services, and repairs marine air conditioning and climate control systems, ensuring your vessel stays comfortable in warm-weather conditions. We work on chilled water systems, self-contained marine AC units, and related components, diagnosing issues accurately and restoring proper cooling performance.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: We handle all aspects of marine plumbing and sanitation, from through-hull fittings and seacocks to holding tanks, marine heads, and waste management systems. Properly functioning onboard plumbing and sanitation is essential for both vessel safety and compliance with marine environmental regulations.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey and full vessel condition inspection
Underwater hull cleaning and running gear inspection by diver
Marine air conditioning system diagnosis, repair, and recharge
Holding tank and marine head replacement or sanitation overhaul
Zinc anode replacement and corrosion protection inspection underwater
Through-hull fitting and seacock inspection, service, or replacement
Insurance or documentation marine survey for existing vessel owners
